statement: In every magma, Equation 3198 (`x = (((y * z) * y) * y) * y`) implies Equation 4126 (`x * y = ((x * x) * z) * w`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0058
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op (op y z) y) y) y)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op (op x x) z) w)
